subject: [DCAEGEN2] Update Cm-container to 4.3.0-SNAPSHOT-20210216T082605Z
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Update Cm-container to 4.3.0-SNAPSHOT-20210216T082605Z

CM-Container changes:
- Update k8splugin to 3.5.2 (add support for configMap)

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2546
Signed-off-by: Edyta Krukowska <edyta.krukowska@nokia.com>
Change-Id: Ic8b6847722dbf1c5f0d8eaea2e9b36388210bb4d
